query_normalized: evaluating the use of graph neural networks for anomaly detection in network traffic computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures the dependent variable (intrusion/anomaly detection) on the same domain (network traffic in MANETs), even though it uses a reputation-based methodology rather than Graph Neural Networks. For a literature review on GNNs for network anomaly detection, this would be relevant related work showing alternative approaches to the same detection task in network security.
